---
title: "Workflow discovery"
---

`MakeWorkflowList()` finds workflows in a directory, sorts them by
`meta$Priority`, skips `Active: false` ones, and can filter by any `meta` field.

```{r}
library(workr)
phase <- "workflows/02_analyze"

ids <- function(wfs) vapply(wfs, function(w) w$meta$ID, character(1))
```

## All names found

```{r}
as.character(ListWorkflowNames(strPath = phase))
```

## Active only (default), priority-sorted

`ZScore` (Active: false) is excluded.

```{r}
ids(MakeWorkflowList(strPath = phase, strPackage = NULL))
```

## Include inactive workflows

```{r}
ids(MakeWorkflowList(strPath = phase, strPackage = NULL, bActiveOnly = FALSE))
```

## Filter by a meta field

```{r}
ids(MakeWorkflowList(strPath = phase, strPackage = NULL, Type = "Analysis"))
```

## Exact-name match

```{r}
nm <- as.character(ListWorkflowNames(strPath = phase))
ids(MakeWorkflowList(strNames = nm[1], strPath = phase, strPackage = NULL, bExact = TRUE))
```
